screenshots.caption: packycode.com 品牌首页，含 PackyAPI 与 Codex 产品卡片
packyapi.com 首页，Enterprise AI Control Plane 定位
PackyAPI VALUE 区：统一入口与全栈可观测
PackyAPI WORKFLOW 区：三步构建 AI 控制平面
PackyAPI ECOSYSTEM 区：30+ 模型提供商集成
codex.packycode.com 首页，AI 编程辅助定位
Codex 核心功能：代码生成、智能调试、代码优化、Git 集成
Codex 终端集成与安全隐私特性
Codex 定价页，含 Sales have been discontinued 停售提示

warnings: web-only: packycode.com is a single-page landing site with no desktop app download links; product functionality is hosted on subdomains (packyapi.com, codex.packycode.com)
android: android.enabled=false; no Android sandbox created, no APK hunt performed
codex-discontinued: codex.packycode.com/pricing shows 'Sales have been discontinued' banner, redirecting users to packyapi.com for pay-as-you-go usage
placeholder-logos: codex.packycode.com shows placeholder client names (TechCorp, DevStudio, CodeLab, BuildCo) in the 'Trusted by' section
